title: Plant-Based Eco-Diapers from Nest
excerpt: I’m always looking for ways to make more eco-friendly lifestyle choices for my family, so when Nest offered to gift me some of their plant-based diapers for Juniper to try, I was super excited! Nest diapers are not only better…
body:
I’m always looking for ways to make more eco-friendly lifestyle choices for my family, so when Nest offered to gift me some of their plant-based diapers for Juniper to try, I was super excited! 

Nest diapers are not only better for our environment, but they’re also better for baby! Their plant-based disposable diapers are made from hand-selected renewable materials that are free from chlorine, fragrance, ammonia, parabens and other harsh chemicals. You can find a full list of ingredients they use on their website and on their packaging. And their diapers are also commercially compostable!

I love that Nest diapers are designed to be absorbent and leak-free while also being super soft, breathable, hypoallergenic and safe for Juniper’s sensitive skin. I don’t know if you can tell from the photo, but she loves her Nest diapers too!

How amazing is Nest to create plant-based diapers that are actually safe for our environment? And they are offering my readers 20% off your first purchase with code AMY20. Right now, you can also get free shipping on any case orders!

If you do try out Nest diapers, let me know how you like them!
